name: GPT-5.6 Model Router
long_description: GPT-5.6 Model Router is a governed Codex plugin. The root may use any model and reasoning effort and may work directly, but once bundled hooks are trusted every root Agent spawn must use a schema-v4 intent prepared by the router, even on turns that do not explicitly invoke its skill. Pure policy selects an enforced Luna, Terra, or Sol route; deviations require user, task-contract, or recorded-failure authority. Hooks constrain write ownership and require hash-bound independent Sol/high review for critical work unless an authorized exception is recorded. Eight schema-v5 roles use Luna/high, Terra/medium-high, and Sol/medium-high. Effective depth is exactly one and every child is a leaf. Transactional setup preserves unrelated configuration and restores the prior depth on uninstall. Hook state remains local under PLUGIN_DATA and stores hashes and route metadata, never raw prompts, messages, diffs, tool output, or secrets. The plugin has no MCP server, hosted backend, connector, analytics, or credential collection.
starter_prompts: $setup-gpt56-model-router Install or upgrade the governed router and trust its hooks.
$route-gpt56-task Handle this task with governed cost-aware GPT-5.6 routing.
$route-gpt56-task Handle this critical change with verified independent review.

bundled_hooks.local_state: PLUGIN_DATA only; hashes and route metadata; no raw prompts, messages, diffs, tool output, or secrets

availability: All countries and regions where OpenAI permits plugin distribution
